channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TEXRAIL] Texmaco Rail launches 'invariz' GCCs, targets $100M revenue by 2030
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has launched "invariz," a network of Global Capability Centers (GCCs) across India, powered by the ServiceNow platform. This initiative marks the company's entry into AI-led global services and digital solutions. The first center was soft-launched in Faridabad, with plans for multi-city expansion. The GCC rollout is projected to create over 1200 direct jobs and generate more than $100 million in incremental revenue by 2030, establishing a new growth engine alongside its core railway and infrastructure businesses. This move represents a strategic pivot for the 86-year-old engineering firm, leveraging AI-driven platforms to deliver automation-led enterprise solutions to domestic and international clients. The company expects the GCC initiative to contribute 10-15% to its overall growth strategy over the medium term.

  • Texmaco Rail launched "invariz" GCCs, entering AI-led global services.
  • Aims for over $100M incremental revenue by 2030 and 1200+ direct jobs.
  • Strategic pivot into high-value digital services using ServiceNow platform.
  • GCCs expected to contribute 10-15% to medium-term growth strategy.
  • Expands revenue streams beyond core railway and infrastructure businesses.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO RAIL & ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [AJIL] Atlas reminds shareholders of SEBI's special window for physical share demat
item.description:
Atlas Jewellery India Ltd issued a reminder to shareholders regarding a special one-year window, from February 5, 2026, to February 4, 2027, for the re-lodgment of transfer deeds and dematerialisation of physical securities. This initiative, based on a SEBI circular dated January 30, 2026, specifically targets securities bought or sold prior to April 1, 2019. To utilize this window, investors must submit mandatory documents including original security certificates, transfer deeds executed before April 1, 2019, proof of purchase, transferee KYC documents, a duly attested undertaking cum indemnity, and a recent Client Master List of their demat account. This aims to streamline the transfer and dematerialisation process for older physical shares.

  • SEBI opened a special window for physical share transfer and dematerialisation.
  • The window is active from February 5, 2026, to February 4, 2027.
  • It applies to securities purchased or sold before April 1, 2019.
  • Mandatory documents include original certificate, pre-2019 transfer deed, and KYC.
  • The initiative facilitates dematerialisation of older physical shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Atlas Jewellery India Limited | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [YUKEN] Yuken India Appoints Rakesh Kumar A as New CEO
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Yuken India Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Rakesh Kumar A as its Chief Executive Officer (CEO), effective April 29, 2026. The Board of Directors approved this based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Rakesh Kumar A is a Mechanical Engineer with over 32 years of experience at the company, having joined in 1993. He has worked across key functions including design, manufacturing, quality, marketing, and sales. He played a crucial role in expanding the company’s presence in the steel and industrial sectors and in localizing steel mill application technology from Yuken Kogyo Co., Ltd., Japan. Since 2018, he has overseen sales and marketing across all business verticals, and in 2024, he was appointed as Chief Operating Officer (COO).

  • Yuken India appointed Mr. Rakesh Kumar A as CEO, effective April 29, 2026.
  • Mr. Kumar brings over 32 years of experience within the company.
  • He previously served as Chief Operating Officer (COO) since 2024.
  • His expertise includes expanding steel and industrial sector presence.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: YUKEN INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AZAD] Nomura India Fund sells 2.05% stake in Azad Engineering
item.description:
Nomura India Investment Fund Mother Fund, along with associated entities, disclosed a sale of shares in Azad Engineering Ltd under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This transaction resulted in a net disposal of 1,321,713 shares, reducing their total holding by 2.05% from 5.13% (as of June 16, 2025) to 3.08%. The shares were sold through the secondary market between June 16, 2025, and April 27, 2026.

  • Nomura India Investment Fund Mother Fund reduced its stake in Azad Engineering.
  • Total holding decreased by 2.05% to 3.08%.
  • The previous holding was 5.13% as of June 16, 2025.
  • A net of 1,321,713 shares were disposed of.
  • The sale was executed via the secondary market.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Azad Engineering Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [GALADA] Galada Power Board to meet May 9, 2026 for FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Galada Power & Telecommunication Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on May 9, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the company's Audited Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, informing stakeholders about the upcoming financial review.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 9, 2026.
  • To consider and approve FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Announcement made as per SEBI Regulation 29.
  • Investors await full year financial performance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GALADA POWER & TELECOMMUNICATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHIVA] Sanjeev Lunkad & PACs' stake in Shivansh Finserve drops to 4.90%
item.description:
Sanjeev Lunkad and Persons Acting in Concert (PACs) have disclosed the sale of 24,773 equity shares of Shivansh Finserve Ltd. This transaction, conducted via open market on April 22, 2026, reduced their collective shareholding from 5.29% to 4.90% of the target company's total capital. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, as their holding fell below the 5% threshold.

  • Sanjeev Lunkad & PACs sold 24,773 equity shares.
  • Their stake in Shivansh Finserve decreased to 4.90%.
  • Previous holding was 5.29% of total capital.
  • The transaction occurred via open market on April 22, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shivansh Finserve Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [EIEL] Enviro Infra Engineers Acquires Suyog Urja for ₹311 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Enviro Infra Engineers Limited, through its wholly owned subsidiary EIE Renewables Private Limited, has announced the strategic acquisition of a controlling stake in Suyog Urja Limited, a wind energy EPC company. The deal is valued at ₹311 crore, with the first tranche of ₹111 crore securing 51% equity. This acquisition significantly strengthens Enviro's renewable energy platform, expanding its capabilities across solar, wind, and Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), complementing its established water and wastewater treatment business. Post-acquisition, the consolidated order book of the Enviro group will stand at approximately ₹5,600 crore, with ₹4,400 crore in EPC (₹2,500 crore water, ₹1,900 crore renewables) and ₹1,200 crore in O&M/IPP. Suyog Urja brings deep domain expertise, a strong execution track record, and an existing order book of approximately ₹650 crore, enhancing Enviro's ability to deliver integrated, future-ready solutions.

  • Enviro Infra Engineers acquires wind EPC company Suyog Urja for ₹311 Cr.
  • Initial 51% equity stake acquired for ₹111 Cr.
  • Expands Enviro's renewable energy platform to include wind, solar, and BESS.
  • Consolidated order book reaches ₹5,600 Cr post-acquisition.
  • Strengthens capabilities and client base in the renewable sector.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SIYARAM] Mukul Agrawal reduces stake in Siyaram Recycling to 6.138%
item.description:
Mukul Agrawal has reduced his shareholding in Siyaram Recycling Industries Ltd. through open market transactions. His stake decreased from 10.097% (2,200,000 shares) to 6.138% (1,337,500 shares) of the company's total voting capital. This reduction involved the sale of 862,500 shares, representing 3.958% of the company, between February 25, 2026, and April 22, 2026. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Mukul Agrawal reduced his stake in Siyaram Recycling Industries.
  • Shareholding decreased from 10.097% to 6.138% via open market.
  • A total of 862,500 shares were sold, representing 3.958%.
  • Transaction occurred between February 25, 2026, and April 22, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover Regulations 29(2).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Siyaram Recycling Industries Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [RETAGGIO] Retaggio Industries Allots 3.3 Lakh Equity Shares via Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Retaggio Industries Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 29, 2026, approved the allotment of 3,30,000 fully paid-up equity shares of ₹10 each. These shares were issued on a preferential basis following the conversion of 3,30,000 convertible warrants. The allottee, Retaggio Trading Services LLP (a promoter entity), paid the balance 75% of the consideration (₹19.5 per share) for the conversion. Consequently, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased to ₹19,23,01,600, divided into 1,92,30,160 equity shares. The new shares rank pari-passu with existing equity shares. Post-allotment, Retaggio Trading Services LLP's shareholding increased from 30.22% to 31.42%.

  • Company allotted 3,30,000 equity shares upon conversion of convertible warrants.
  • Shares were issued on a preferential basis to Retaggio Trading Services LLP (Promoter).
  • Paid-up equity share capital increased to ₹19.23 Crores.
  • Promoter's shareholding increased from 30.22% to 31.42% post-allotment.
  • Each equity share was allotted at ₹26, with ₹19.5 paid upon conversion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Retaggio Industries Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [SHREEJISPG] Shreeji Shipping acquires two mini bulk carriers for ₹55.66 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shreeji Shipping Global Ltd has strategically acquired two Mini Bulk Carrier vessels, M.V. Gautam BSTAR II and M.V. Sanghi Sudarshan, from Gautam Freight Private Limited for an aggregate consideration of ₹55,66,05,000/- (inclusive of GST). The Vessel Purchase Agreements were executed on April 28, 2026, with delivery scheduled on or before May 1, 2026. These ICV-classed vessels, totaling 8,810.80 DWT, will significantly expand the company's fleet and strengthen its operational presence in the coastal shipping corridor. Their low draft profile allows access to tidal and draft-restricted minor ports, enhancing cargo movement opportunities and making coastal logistics more efficient and cost-competitive. This acquisition is anticipated to improve fleet utilization, optimize operating economics, and contribute positively to the company’s revenue, profitability, and long-term value creation.

  • Acquired two Mini Bulk Carrier vessels for ₹55.66 crore.
  • Vessels, M.V. Gautam BSTAR II and M.V. Sanghi Sudarshan, total 8,810.80 DWT.
  • Enhances fleet, strengthens coastal shipping, and dry-bulk transhipment services.
  • Low draft profile enables access to shallow-draft minor ports.
  • Expected to boost revenue, profitability, and fleet utilization.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shreeji Shipping Global Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
